title: Business Analyst
jobDescription:
Job Summary

We are looking for a Business Analyst with 4-6 years of experience in business systems analysis and quality assurance. The role involves gathering, analyzing, and managing business requirements for Global Technology services. The Business Analyst will work closely with business stakeholders and development teams throughout the software development lifecycle to ensure successful delivery of solutions.


Roles and Responsibilities

  • Gather, analyze, document, and validate business and functional requirements.
  • Write clear and detailed features and user stories.
  • Act as a liaison between business stakeholders and development teams.
  • Assess business needs and recommend solutions, priorities, and trade-offs.
  • Support solution design and participate in design reviews.
  • Ensure solutions meet business and functional requirements.
  • Analyze the impact of changes on existing systems.
  • Perform manual testing, including script-based and exploratory testing.
  • Conduct platform compatibility testing, including Microsoft platform upgrades.
  • Document, track, and close defects.
  • Support deployment activities and assist end users with advanced issues.
  • Create training materials and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions.
  • Work effectively in a fast-paced, high-demand environment.

Required Skills

  • 4-6 years of experience as a Business Analyst or Business Systems Analyst.
  • Experience in requirements analysis and documentation.
  • Strong ability to write features and user stories.
  • Hands-on experience in manual testing.
  • Good understanding of SDLC and Agile methodologies.
  • Working knowledge of Azure DevOps (ADO).
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
  • Clear verbal and written communication skills.
  • Self-motivated with a strong sense of ownership.

Preferred Skills

  • Experience with SQL and relational databases.
  • Exposure to test automation frameworks.
  • Experience supporting production systems and end users.
  • Experience working in global or enterprise environments.
